primary_hypothesis.statement: Remote-hands insider access via IP-KVM; operator credentials misused

findings.description: Unusual binary first-executed shortly after reported login
IP-KVM device inserted ~3 min before operator logon — remote-hands pattern

unresolved: USB timeline contradicts login telemetry: IP-KVM insertion (VID=0557 PID=2419) precedes the operator logon by ~3 minutes.
